findings.title: Privacy Risk Due to Lack of Granular Consent Mechanisms
findings.description: The current consent options do not meet GDPR requirements, which poses a significant risk of non-compliance and potential legal challenges. Users require granular consent mechanisms for data processing, especially for cross-device tracking and data sharing with advertisers.
assumptions: Users are concerned about how their data is used and require control over their consent.

evidence.excerpt: Legal concerns highlight the necessity for granular consent mechanisms for data processing, especially regarding cross-device tracking and data sharing with advertisers.

recommendations: Implement granular consent mechanisms for data processing.

metadata.mitigation: Develop granular consent mechanisms for data processing.

findings.title: GDPR Compliance Audit Blocker
findings.description: The PersonaLens profiling system requires a full GDPR compliance audit before launch. This is critical as it impacts the lawful basis for processing behavioral data and consent mechanisms for cross-device tracking.
assumptions: A compliance audit is necessary to ensure legal operation under GDPR.

evidence.excerpt: The PersonaLens profiling system requires a full GDPR compliance audit before launch.

recommendations: Conduct a full GDPR compliance audit.

metadata.mitigation: Conduct a full GDPR compliance audit.

findings.title: Privacy Risks in User Tracking
findings.description: Privacy risks have been flagged due to the nature of data collection and potential for re-identification of users from anonymized data. This could lead to legal challenges and user trust issues.
assumptions: Anonymized data can still lead to re-identification under certain conditions.

evidence.excerpt: Privacy risks have been flagged due to the nature of data collection and potential for re-identification of users from anonymized data.

recommendations: Implement stronger data anonymization techniques and user consent options.

metadata.mitigation: Implement stronger data anonymization techniques and user consent options.

findings.title: Authentication Weaknesses Detected
findings.description: There are identified weaknesses in the authentication mechanisms that could allow unauthorized access to user data, posing a significant security risk.
assumptions: Current authentication methods may not be robust enough to prevent unauthorized access.

evidence.excerpt: Detected auth risk keywords in 3 source(s).

recommendations: Enhance authentication mechanisms to include multi-factor authentication.

metadata.mitigation: Enhance authentication mechanisms to include multi-factor authentication.

findings.title: Compliance Risks Related to Data Sharing
findings.description: Sharing anonymized user profile segments with advertisers poses significant legal risks, including potential re-identification and non-compliance with GDPR. User consent for data sharing is crucial.
assumptions: Anonymized data can be re-identified, leading to compliance issues.

evidence.excerpt: Sharing anonymized user profile segments with advertisers poses significant legal risks, including potential re-identification and non-compliance with GDPR.

recommendations: Ensure user consent for data sharing and implement strict data handling policies.

metadata.mitigation: Ensure user consent for data sharing and implement strict data handling policies.

findings.title: Accessibility Gaps in Screen Reader Support
findings.description: The product currently lacks screen reader support, which violates accessibility standards and limits usability for visually impaired users.
assumptions: Users with visual impairments cannot effectively use the product without screen reader support.

evidence.excerpt: Accessibility basics required; full WCAG compliance in V2.

recommendations: Implement screen reader support to enhance accessibility.

metadata.mitigation: Implement screen reader support to enhance accessibility.

summary: Identified 6 risks (1 accessibility, 2 compliance, 2 privacy, 1 security). 4 flagged as blockers. Risk gate: FAILED (4 blockers, 0 warnings).
